title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Compromise: Public leaderboard with a
content:
✔ Compromise: Public leaderboard with anonymized rankings (e.g., “Top 3 Scholars of the Week”).

2. Should students be able to “gift” XP to another student once per semester?

✔ Example: If a student has extra XP, they can transfer some to a struggling classmate as an act of mentorship.
✔ Prevents hoarding but adds a social/communal strategy.

3. Should XP have a hidden “secret use” that is only revealed in the final weeks?

✔ Example: If a student saves 100+ XP, they unlock a mysterious letter with a final challenge/opportunity.

🚀 Version 5.1 now fully integrates risk-reward mechanics, ethical challenges, XP strategy, and narrative framing into a cohesive system.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 5.2 – Final Refinements: Dual Settings (Day/Night), Writing Prompts Expansion, Referencing Rules, Practical POV Actions, & Hidden XP Uses
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 138 (chunk 138/555)
